title: Heaven Empire
content:
Di Shan Empire tried to attack the school of heaven but was beaten without any bloodshed and in less than a month at that !

It was then, placed under the school as the Heaven Empire.

Eventually, the 2 other Empires tried to attack the School but in the end they were defeated and annexed to the Heaven Empire.

From this day, it is the only Empire on 
Planet Ran Yun
.
